external_narratives.summary: Reference to Wellington crash sites in the Ffridd Rhosfarch area of Wales. The Wellington from 21 OTU Moreton-in-Marsh crashed into the hillside at approximately 11:40am during a cross-country training flight in 1941, killing all aboard.
external_narratives.key_details: Crew likely mistook the Dyfi estuary for the sea, leading to navigational error in poor visibility. Cross-country training flight from RAF Moreton-in-Marsh, Gloucestershire.
